description: Suffix harmony -li/-le: -li after stems whose last vowel is a/i/u, -le after mid vowels e/o (height harmony).
mechanism: PhonologicalRule: alpha-variable on vowel height (archiphoneme suffix vowel)

description: vi~vy: consonant→'vi', vowel→'vy' on the following segment (high-vowel/glide-like (vocalic); alternates ['i', 'y'])
rule: vi~vy: consonant→'vi', vowel→'vy' on the following segment (high-vowel/glide-like (vocalic); alternates ['i', 'y'])
